## `rad` [promql-fn-rad]

{applies_to}`stack: preview 9.4.0` {applies_to}`serverless: preview`

Converts input values from degrees to radians for all elements in the input vector.

Returns `instant_vector`.

### Parameters

`v` (`instant_vector`)
:   Instant vector input.

### Example

```
rad(some_metric)
```
